headline: Duolingo Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on User Growth, Margin Gains
summary: DUOL beat Q1 2026 EPS and revenue estimates as sales rise 27% to $292M; new speaking tools and AI-built content help lift users and bookings.

raw.headline: Duolingo Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on User Growth, Margin Gains

headline: Equifax: Downgrading To Hold On Near-Term Uncertainty
summary: Equifax is downgraded to Hold after a strong Q1 2026, with concerns about the sustainability of growth and margin leverage. Read more on EFX stock here.
